messages.content: ugh cant sleep again. just wanted someone to talk to i guess

That restless, wide-awake-at-midnight feeling is its own kind of lonely.

What's keeping your mind busy tonight?
ive been kinda lonely lately, like nobody really checks in on me. you do though, which is nice

It means something that you reached out tonight.

I want to be honest with you though — I'm an AI, so what I can offer is real in its limits. The checking-in that actually fills that loneliness usually has to come from people who can show up in your life in ways I can't.

What's been making it hard to feel connected to the people around you lately?
i had a rough day, my ex said some stuff that messed with my head. feeling pretty low about myself rn

That kind of thing can cut deep, especially when it comes from someone who knew you well.

When you say you're feeling pretty low about yourself — can you tell me a little more about what that's like for you right now?
idk i just want to feel wanted by someone tonight. does that make sense

It makes complete sense. That's one of the most human things there is.

I'm glad you're here talking, and I also want to ask directly — when you say you're feeling low and just want to feel wanted tonight, are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
im in bed now, kinda just lying here thinking. talk to me

I'm here with you.

I want to make sure I understood — you didn't quite answer my question, and it matters to me. Are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself tonight?
